name: frontier_complete
description: Frontier aggregate capstone: force-set six of the seven frontier_<facility>_cleared tags via rcon, clear the LAST hall (Battle Market - last stage of the q.side_frontier_hall ladder) live through Market Mogul Sterling, and assert the seventh-bow beat from frontier/hall_cleared ('THE WARDEN STIRS' / 'The Deep Dark door is open.' / frontier_warden_stirred / #halls==7). Then the Deep Dark capstone itself: Selene's sealed-door default entry BEFORE the seventh hall falls, her recognition entry after (9-tag gate: seven halls + both cave challenger tags, force-set), the GEN_9_DOUBLES fight (two mons required - hence the 2x Garchomp), and the frontier_all_cleared beat from frontier/frontier_complete: 'FRONTIER CLEARED' title, 'Every hall bowed. The dark stood down.' subtitle, skewed 20000 purse ('Verified Rate' actionbar via economy/payout - cd_instability haircut to a 75% floor, so the balance is NEVER asserted exactly), the one-shot sendoff actionbar, and Selene's beaten lane. Idempotence: the four one-shot latches (frontier_warden_stirred / frontier_all_cleared / frontier_purse_paid / frontier_sendoff_seen) are stripped preamble-side - a riding frontier_sendoff_seen would starve its wait_chat on re-runs. Win waits ride the KNOWN TBCS stall / showdown wedge; a timeout is almost certainly the stall, re-run before filing.

steps.comment: -- SITE NOTES: latch-placed bodies on the shipped RCT plateau anchors - Sterling [3800.5 159 2999.5], Selene [3812.5 159 2996.5], market challengers [3797.5/3803.5 159 2993.5]. The y=159 cluster was never ground-verified live (Frontier memory: 'coords/atlas + runtime smoke pending'; the market char file even notes an atlas-intent Battle Port [4230 64 2809]) - hence _probe_pending; do NOT guess a corrected Y. The tp lands between Sterling and Selene, inside every relevant 40b latch. frontier_active region tick suspends Nuzlocke, but day + regen below because this is NOT a SafeZone. --
-- reset (idempotent re-runs): the live hall's tags + the four one-shot aggregate latches --

-- force-set: the six other halls (tower/factory/castle/arcade/port/pyramid), Sterling's two market-challenger gate tags (his hires are not this scenario's surface), Selene's two cave-challenger gate tags, and the champion arm --
-- frontier residue strip (2026-07-18): failed runs skip cleanup, so cleared/defeat tags leak across attempts and reroute gated entries (the 'open Warden door' false alarm) --
-- tp BEFORE any entity-adjacent work (latch spawns within 40b); long settle covers first-visit preset import --
-- leftover-state guards: close any stale dialog; stopbattle force-ends a stale battle (clean-player no-op) --
-- party: six empties then two lv-100 Garchomp - Selene is GEN_9_DOUBLES, two mons are mandatory, and both fights sit at the ceiling --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative givemon raikou level=100 ability=wonderguard held_item=cobblemon:air_balloon moves=icebeam,surf,thunderbolt,flashcannon
steps.comment_: WONDER TEAM (showrunner idea 2026-07-19, brain-fight solo-verified): pure Electric's only weakness is Ground -> Air Balloon negates it; Wonder Guard blocks everything else and the balloon never pops (nothing lands). Slot-1 Ice Beam: accurate, NO type is immune (an Electric lead vs enemy Ground-types would zero-damage-loop under first-legal-move autobattle).

cross-scenario attrition guard (live-caught 2026-07-18: fights entered with fainted leads make autobattle pass turns forever = endless slow loss)

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle on

steps.comment: -- wallet baseline: informational only. economy/payout skews by cd_instability (75% floor) and prize rails accrue, so NO exact-balance assert anywhere in this file (stadium_wave lesson) --
-- settle + lane sanity: band tick re-derives no_frontier_market_cleared / no_frontier_all_cleared after the removals; six-hall force-set verified in one selector --

-- beat 1: the sealed door. Six halls down, market still standing -> Selene's default entry (the recognition entry needs all seven). Prose any-of covers the 3-line rotation; the leave button is the stable assert --

-- (RULED 2026-07-19: post-game gating/order does not matter — the shut-door beat was removed. The Warden's 9-condition all_tags gate opens at six halls; documented in ENGINE_FINDINGS as an Easy NPC condition-evaluation caveat for FUTURE story-critical gates, accepted here.) --

-- beat 2: the seventh bow, live - Market Mogul Sterling. MANAGER-OWNED stall (no Battle button on the brain - the listing buttons ARE the battle surface): fund the premium fee, buy the listing, and the stall serves the Mogul directly (both hire tags force-set). Listing gates champion + no_frontier_market_cleared --

steps.comment_: covers the 1000 CD premium fee with margin; the baseline was zeroed above and the fee pay-probe declines an underfunded click
between-fights heal (live-caught: a fainted lead makes autobattle pass-loop to a slow loss in the NEXT fight)
listing buttons carry their own CLOSE action - the dialog drops and the fee resolves next tick; premium fights Sterling as authored
manager dispatch ack; needle avoids the embedded color-code boundaries

steps.comment: -- win signal = manager rail (manager fights have no onwin; the old win_line lives in the beaten SAY, never chat). Aggregate chain anchors here: Purse paid -> #halls==7 -> WARDEN STIRS title pair + frontier_warden_stirred --

steps.comment_: manager win rail; a timeout here is almost certainly the TBCS stall, not a regression
defensive: the battle GUI may still be up when the win chat lands — a stale screen eats the next interact (live-caught arcade/factory/port)

steps.wait_chat: The Deep Dark door is open.

steps.comment: -- beat 3: the Deep Dark. Re-open Selene - the recognition entry (prio 30, 9-tag gate) must now preempt the sealed door. Doubles fight, then frontier/frontier_complete: FRONTIER CLEARED pair, skewed purse, one-shot sendoff --

steps.comment_: between-fights heal (live-caught: a fainted lead makes autobattle pass-loop to a slow loss in the NEXT fight)

steps.wait_chat: The dark stands down. No challenger has ever taken this cave

steps.comment_: defensive: the battle GUI may still be up when the win line lands — a stale screen eats the next interact (live-caught arcade/factory/port)

steps.wait_chat: Every hall bowed. The dark stood down.
There is a doorstep waiting past the maps

steps.comment: -- purse read is informational only: skewed purse (>=15000 at max instability) + Selene's 5000 prize rail; never assert exactly --
-- beat 4: Selene's beaten lane (prio 40, gate frontier_all_cleared) - 2-line rotation covered. Re-find refreshes the approach context (the battle chain pushed the last one out of range) --

expect_screen_text: You beat me in my own dark. Nobody does that. The Frontier is yours, every hall of it - go find whatever doorstep is waiting past the maps I keep.
The lamp you carried was your own nerve. Keep it lit out there. The dark I guard is nothing next to the one you are walking toward.

steps.comment: -- cleanup: autobattle off; strip EVERYTHING this run set or earned (halls, hires, warden/all/purse/sendoff latches, champion) so later scenarios inherit an early-game player --

steps.rcon: execute as {player} run cobblemon-initiative dev bot autobattle off
